text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the race, Ines Fujin is trembling with sheer
anticipation. I can tell she's even more excited
now than she was before her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us have chased her dream this far, and
I bet at the Japan Cup she's going to show me
where it goes next!
